by_issue.label: Vibe score 1-4
by_issue.formula: Reviewers score each call 1 to 4. We count how often they land within 1 point of each other, and of the expert. A 3-vs-4 split is normal disagreement; 1-vs-4 is a real miss.

by_issue.label: Transcription
by_issue.formula: Share of words transcribed exactly right (1,770 calls checked reviewer-to-reviewer, 1,684 against an expert). A wrong word counts as wrong.

by_issue.label: Issue logging
by_issue.formula: When two reviewers both flag a call, how often they pick the same error type (50 paired calls reviewer-to-reviewer, 41 against an expert) - the category, not just "something's wrong".

by_issue.label: Pronunciation
by_issue.formula: How often reviewers give the same tag on the same call (18 paired calls). The expert-labelled set is still small and growing each batch.

human_vs_llm.method: Calls where each side caught the issue. On audio the judge is blind (it produces no findings), so humans do 100% of it. On transcript-visible issues the judge scales the check far past the human sample, and agrees with the panel where both looked (language 85%).
